displayTitle: Predict the Move Before the Probe

beats.narration: Every eddy current reading is one dot moving on the impedance plane. At Level Two, call its direction before the probe touches down.

payload.title: PREDICT THE MOVE
payload.sub: The test part owns conductivity and permeability.

beats.narration: Normalize the coil and every nonmagnetic alloy lands on one comma-shaped curve. Raise conductivity and the dot sweeps down it, leaving air behind.

payload.heading: One curve holds every alloy
payload.note: AIR POINT (0,1) · σ UP → DOWN-AND-AROUND · KNEE = BEST SEPARATION

beats.narration: Position follows the product of frequency, conductivity, and permeability. Frequency slides every alloy along the curve, and the knee separates lift-off from conductivity.
Ferromagnetic parts break the pattern. Permeability in the hundreds multiplies flux, lifting the dot above air, collapsing penetration, drowning flaws in noise.

payload.heading: Steel rides above the air point

beats.narration: The cure is magnetic saturation: drive steel flat and it behaves like a plain conductor again. Direction names the variable; distance sizes it.

payload.sub: Direction names the variable; distance sizes it.
